rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope
Use only identifiers visible in the current scope for AGREE expressions
Do not modify the AADL model structure during fusion
generic_rules: Maintain the original component hierarchy and connections
Preserve all existing subcomponents and their connections
Do not introduce new components or connections without explicit requirements
Ensure all inserted annex blocks are valid in their target scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for AGREE annex blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
Use only valid identifiers from the current scope
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions
Do not compare event ports with numeric or Boolean values
Do not modify the AADL model structure during fusion
